Frozen fixtures for unit / graphics tests (RFC §10.10.4).

- **minimal-2x2.json** — two bars, two levels each.
- **wide-numbers.json** — very large/small metric values (formatting / overflow).
- **sparse-levels.json** — missing `metricId` keys (blank cell policy).
- **stress-256-levels.json** — 256 rows (layout perf smoke).
- **revision-sequence.json** — monotonic `revision` on last bar.
- **retain-gap-whitespace.json** — placeholder for `retainGap` host contract (whitespace slots).
